intro.title: ℹ️ About the Website
intro.description: "Dialects Atlas" is an online tool focused on Middle Chinese position analysis, dialect comparison, and geolinguistics, dedicated to presenting the phonological layers and phonemic mergers of various dialect points in a clear and interactive way.

feature1.title: Feature 1: Middle Chinese Query (Organize pronunciations by Middle Chinese position).
feature1.description: Users can input various combinations for analysis. Currently supports categories such as rime group, rime, grade, division, tone, series, group, initial, voicing, place of articulation, and manner of articulation. The website analyzes initials/finals/tones based on the input combinations and presents the results in tables and maps.

feature2.title: Feature 2: Phoneme Query (Analyze the Middle Chinese origins of phonemes).
feature2.description: Users can input the above categories, and the website will analyze the Middle Chinese origins of the input phonetic values (phonemes) and present the results in tables and maps.

feature3.title: Feature 3: Tone Query (Query tone values and tone categories).
feature3.description: The website organizes tone values and tone categories based on the user's selected region and location, with different tone categories marked in different colors.

feature4.title: Feature 4: Character Query (Query character pronunciations and positions).
feature4.description: Query based on user-input Chinese characters, ultimately presenting the phonetic values, notes, and Middle Chinese positions of each location

feature5.title: Feature 5: Regional Mapping (Draw dialect maps by Atlas Region 2 / Dictionary Region).

feature6.title: Feature 6: Custom Mapping (Users add personal data for mapping).
feature6.description: Users can select points and annotate on the map themselves, and the website will automatically assign colors based on feature values

features.blueText: The blue text in the tables (positions, phonetic values, etc.) are generally clickable. After clicking, a detailed query will be performed in a new popup, making it easy to compare with the original results
features.mapClick: Points on the map can also be clicked to query detailed information.

intro.footer: Welcome to explore "Dialects Atlas" and touch the historical layers of dialects together!

reflection.title: 🧑‍💻 Development Reflection
reflection.paragraph1: Initially, I just wanted to create a handy tool for my own research, but unknowingly, I explored the vast starry sky. From the first line of code to the first function, from naive ideas to a gradually rich system, day and night alternating on the keyboard, my ideas gradually took root from nothingness. I look at this website as if watching my own child learning to walk, step by step forming its own outline. Every button, every interaction, is imprinted with a period of time. I was exhausted trying to implement the desired query logic, and I was also delighted by the successful presentation of visual effects—these bits and pieces have become her blood and flesh, soul and spirit.
reflection.paragraph2: In fact, this is also a journey of self-transformation. From knowing nothing about front-end development, to exploring DOM, trying virtual scrolling, advancing to using frameworks, and even appreciating the subtleties of JWT and ORM. I learned while building, and matured through mistakes. The most fascinating part is that the bricks I used to build all this are the knowledge I longed to learn: building the website deepened my understanding of phonology, and studying phonology drove the iteration of code. Technology is no longer cold commands to me, but a vessel carrying culture; culture is no longer distant literature to me, gradually becoming an interactive, traceable, and touchable entity.
reflection.paragraph3: This is my answer written with code and passion, the most sincere gift from an ordinary student to the field of dialects. Thank you to everyone who encounters it. I hope this still immature creation can stir a ripple of curiosity in your heart, or save you a moment of time searching through materials. This is the meaning of her existence.
reflection.poem:
May the dialects of all directions live on forever;
May the beauty of Chinese characters be cherished forever;
May the flame of civilization endure in every interaction and resonance.
